stonetop.summary: A skull-headed, antlered grave-guardian goat of rock and bone.

system.concept: A skull-headed, antlered grave-guardian goat of rock and bone.
system.description: @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.oi5Mg2wPABRjvHri]{The Rime Lords} and their disciples created shaksa to guard over cemeteries and charnel grounds; they usually watch, unseen and unmanifest. A shaksa manifests only within its cemetery, appearing as a powerful goat made of rock and soil, with a human (?) skull for a head, three eyes of floating light, and a single great antler of jagged bone. Once manifest, it can leave the cemetery in pursuit of looters or vandals — but should this form be destroyed, the spirit returns to the cemetery and cannot remanifest until the next sunset.
